novel_features.name: Recipient email timeline
novel_features.description: Every email sent to a single recipient address, with delivery status and timestamps, ordered newest-first.

novel_features.name: Cross-event delivery trace
novel_features.description: Collapsed event chain for a single email: sent → delivered → opened → clicked → bounced, in one ordered table.

novel_features.name: Audience inventory rollup
novel_features.description: Per-audience rollup: contact count, unsubscribed count, last-broadcast timestamp, recent open-rate.

novel_features.name: Cross-audience contact lookup
novel_features.description: Find every audience, segment, and topic a contact (by email or name) belongs to in one query.

novel_features.name: Broadcast performance dashboard
novel_features.description: Open / click / bounce rate across all broadcasts, sortable; not limited to a single broadcast or 30-day window.

novel_features.name: Domain health summary
novel_features.description: Verification + DKIM/SPF/DMARC status across every domain in one table, flags missing or unverified records.

novel_features.name: Deliverability summary
novel_features.description: Bounce rate, complaint rate, and suppression count over a rolling window (default 7d) computed from local event data.

novel_features.name: API-key rotation audit
novel_features.description: API keys sorted by age + last-used timestamp (joined from logs); flags stale keys older than N days.
